fields.label: API v2 Token
fields.helpText: From monday.com -> Avatar -> Developers -> My Access Tokens

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API token via Monday GraphQL endpoint

resources.label: Boards
resources.description: Monday.com boards. Scope a credential so an agent only sees the boards you intend.

list_endpoint.body: {"query":"{ boards (limit: 200, state: active) { id name description workspace { id name } } }"}

metadata.summary: Monday.com work management platform for projects, workflows, and CRM.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to monday.com and sign in to your account
2. Click your avatar -> Administration -> API
3. Copy your personal API token (or generate a new one)
4. Paste the token value here
